{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Kortali
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kortali]] was destroyed almost twenty years ago.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c5">''City of Light'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“Kortali was destroyed almost twenty years gone.”<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
